message:
feat(server): add host binding, log directory, and poll interval config

Three infrastructure improvements:

internal/serve/server.go - Configurable host binding:
- Problem: Server only bound to port, defaulting to all interfaces (0.0.0.0).
  This exposed the API to the network which is unnecessary for local use.
- Solution: Add Host field to Config, default to "127.0.0.1".
- Server now binds to host:port instead of just :port.
- Log message updated to show full bind address.
- Improves security: localhost-only by default, network if explicitly set.

internal/resilience/manifest.go - LogDir() function:
- Adds helper to get XDG-compliant log directory.
- Path: ~/.local/share/ntm/logs (or XDG_DATA_HOME/ntm/logs).
- Used by spawn command to write monitor process logs.
- Falls back to "logs" if home directory unavailable.
- Enables post-mortem debugging of resilience monitor issues.

internal/cli/watch.go - Poll interval passthrough:
- Adds WithPollInterval option to watcher configuration.
- Previously poll interval from opts was ignored.
- Allows users to tune file watching frequency via --poll-interval flag.
- Reduces CPU usage for projects with slow filesystems.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 	w, err := watcher.New(handler,
 		watcher.WithRecursive(true),
+		watcher.WithPollInterval(opts.pollInterval),
 		watcher.WithIgnorePaths([]string{
 			".git",
 			"node_modules",
